items.title: AC Milan Fires Allegri, CEO Furlani For 'Unequivocal Failure' Of A Season
items.summary: AC Milan has fired coach Massimiliano Allegri, CEO Giorgio Furlani and other senior officials after what it calls an “unequivocal failure" of a season.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Jordan leads star names at Guardiola's leaving party
items.summary: Basketball legend Michael Jordan led the cast of star names to pay tribute to Pep Guardiola at the Manchester City manager's farewell party.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: GB's Boulter scrapes into French Open second round
items.summary: Great Britain's Katie Boulter reaches the French Open second round, grinding out a gruelling win over American wildcard Akasha Urhobo.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
